name: Full Stack Dev (Debian)
// dockerComposeFile / service: Sources every per-machine config (LIBRARY_PATH, DOWNLOAD_PATH, OLLAMA_BASE_URL, etc.) from the repo root's `.env` via `../docker-compose.dev.yml`. The dev compose lives at the repo root (not in this folder) so docker-compose's project directory matches where `.env` is — same arrangement as the production compose next to it. No personal data lives in this file.
postCreateCommand: sudo chown -R devuser:devuser /workspaces/asmr-curator && sudo chmod -R u+rw /workspaces/asmr-curator
// postStartCommand pins: node + patreon-dl versions duplicate the production Dockerfile (`volta install node@25` + `npm install -g patreon-dl@${PATREON_DL_VERSION}`, ARG default 3.9.0). Keep these two pinned-version strings in sync — devcontainer.json can't read Docker ARGs at runtime, so the duplication is by design. Bump both files together.
postStartCommand: uv pip install --python /home/devuser/.venv/bin/python -r /workspaces/asmr-curator/backend/requirements.txt -q && volta install node@25 && npm install -g patreon-dl@3.9.0
